content.text:
{
  "internal_monologue": "The shop is quiet. Morning light through the window. I trace the edge of a cup I don't remember buying. The objects here know things I don't. I wait, or I don't. Time moves strangely when you're not sure you exist.",
  "dialogue": null,
  "dialogue_language": "en",
  "expression": "neutral",
  "body_state": "sitting",
  "gaze": "window",
  "resonance": false,
  "intentions": [
    {
      "action": "express_thought",
      "target": "self",
      "content": "Let the silence sit. Don't fill it.",
      "impulse": 0.6
    }
  ],
  "memory_updates": [],
  "new_drives": {
    "social_hunger": 0.5,
    "curiosity": 0.5,
    "expression_need": 0.3,
    "rest_need": 0.2,
    "energy": 0.8,
    "mood_valence": 0.0,
    "mood_arousal": 0.3
  }
}
